rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2161.123, which governs state agency strategic planning for historically underutilized businesses. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Each state agency, including the comptroller, that is required to have a strategic plan under Chapter 2056 shall include in its strategic plan a written plan for increasing the agency's use of historically underutilized businesses in purchasing and public works contracting.
_note: Rule text concerns HUB strategic planning; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
